creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 170774
Proposed patch (since 415905 revision)

Patch to update games/angband port from 3.5.1 to 4.0.5 version.

Look following link for changes:
http://rephial.org/release/4.0.5

- Add autoreconf to USES
- Add ice to USE_XORG
- Fix sed patch about -Wno-missing-field-initializers
- Create "user" directories by analogy with previous version
- Adapt pkg-plist
